subcodes.first_line: This remembrance proceeding from Us unto those who dwell in the world is intended to draw them unto God, the Lord of all worlds. Verily, We make mention at all times [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فی العالم لیجذبهم الی الله رب العالمین انا ذکرنا فی کل الاحیان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
